text:
IPPS-excluded rehabilitation or psychiatric units or swing beds (as applicable). It is 
null/missing for all other provider types. 

The first two digits indicate the state where the provider is located, using the SSA state codes; the 
middle two characters indicate the type of provider; and the last two digits are used as a counter for the 
number of providers within that state and type of provider (i.e., this is a unique but not necessarily 
sequential number). 

SHORT NAME:
